The Proposal:
As per the Government Decision No. 1 in the context, the State Government provides 6 per cent to the farmers of the State.
It was decided to provide government finance for short term crop loans at interest rates.
According to this decision, the banks, which are in line with the policy of the central government, will give loans to farmers at an interest rate of 7 percent.
The banks that are going to supply should provide loans to the farmers at an interest rate of 6 per cent instead of 7 per cent.
This is the policy of the state government. The financial burden of the 1 percent interest differential amount for this purpose
